# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: default-allow-all
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: default-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: "*"
          namespace: "*"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-https-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: https
  proxyProtocol: TLS
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: default-https-allow-all
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: default-https-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: "*"
          namespace: "*"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-grpc-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: gRPC
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: default-grpc-allow-all
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: default-grpc-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: "*"
          namespace: "*"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-all-unauthenticated
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: all-unauthenticated
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: default-unauthenticated-allow
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: default-all-unauthenticated
  client:
    unauthenticated: true
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: ""
    kind: Namespace
    name: default
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: default-authn
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-authn
  namespace: default
spec:
  identities:
    - "*"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-network-authn
  namespace: default
spec:
  networks:
    - cidr: 0.0.0.0/0
    - cidr: ::/0
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: default-route
  namespace: default
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: default-server
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            type: PathPrefix
            value: /
      backendRefs:
        - name: default-backend
          port: 8080
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-admin-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/component: admin
  port: admin
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: default-admin-restricted
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: default-admin-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: admin-sa
          namespace: default
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-probe-server
  namespace: default
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels: {}
  port: probe
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: default-probe-allow
  namespace: default
spec:
  server:
    name: default-probe-server
  client:
    networks:
      - cidr: 0.0.0.0/0
      - cidr: ::/0
